meaning: n.[植] 红毛丹树(产于马来西亚),红毛丹果
examples: Found in red and green peppers; and rambutan fruit.
Rambutan is an odd fruit that looks like a furry strawberry from the outside, and much like a lychee on the inside.
The rambutan flesh was segmented using the FCM (fuzzy C-mean) clustering method after removing the background of the image.
